---
title: "AI Data Centers and Power Grid Load Shifts"
author: "Mingie Wei, Si Min Loo, Seohyun Oh"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r load-data}
mida_raw <- read_excel("Region_MIDA.xlsx")
tex_raw  <- read_excel("Region_TEX.xlsx")
```

```{r}
glimpse(mida_raw)
```


```{r}
mida_clean <- mida_raw %>%
  select(`Local date`, Hour, Demand, `Demand forecast`, `Net generation`) %>%
  rename(
    date            = `Local date`,
    hour            = Hour,
    demand_mwh      = Demand,
    demand_forecast = `Demand forecast`,
    generation = `Net generation`
  ) %>%
  mutate(date = as_date(date)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(demand_mwh))

tex_clean <- tex_raw %>%
  select(`Local date`, Hour, Demand, `Demand forecast`, `Net generation`) %>%
  rename(
    date            = `Local date`,
    hour            = Hour,
    demand_mwh      = Demand,
    demand_forecast = `Demand forecast`,
    generation = `Net generation`
  ) %>%
  mutate(date = as_date(date)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(demand_mwh))
```

```{r}
(mida_clean)
tex_clean
```
